n: Instance: An Eye in the Storm

steps.t: Techeryn is standing on the path that winds up to the summit of Weathertop. Techeryn is waiting to speak with you.
Three flat stones can be found on the summit of Weathertop. Techeryn has asked you to place three rune-stones on flat stones on the summit of Weathert…
Lightning has struck each of the three rune-stones you placed on the summit, and you should now collect them all again.
Techeryn has come to the summit of Weathertop, and is waiting to speak with you.
